message:
feat(security): add SEC-5.1 alert dispatch integration and 30 integration tests

- Record SecurityAlert at all enforcement decision points:
  - Policy denial (deny_caps, per-extension deny)
  - Anomaly denial (risk scorer harden/deny)
  - Quarantine (risk scorer terminate)
  - Quota breach
  - Exec mediation (deny/audit)
- Fix missing `enforce` field in set_runtime_risk_config
- Add closing brace for shadow mode else block
- 30 integration tests covering alert types, serde stability,
  severity ordering, who/what/why/action fields, artifact export,
  and policy vs anomaly denial distinction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
